'''Ceriun''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located in the [[Ceriun system/Legends|Ceriun system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Around [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], a [[Unidentified tattooed Sith|tattooed Sith]] journeyed to the planet to retrieve a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that had been taken there by a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|17|All for You}}
